hooks.command: ROOT="${K_ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT:-/opt/k-orchestrator}"; if [ -f "$ROOT/hooks/session-context-loader.sh" ]; then bash "$ROOT/hooks/session-context-loader.sh"; else echo '[k-orchestrator] SessionStart: CLAUDE.md 및 docs/EXECUTION_STATUS.md를 먼저 확인하세요.'; fi
echo '[k-orchestrator] PreCompact: compact 전 docs/EXECUTION_STATUS.md 업데이트 여부를 확인하세요.'

ROOT="${K_ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT:-/opt/k-orchestrator}"; if [ -f "$ROOT/hooks/stop-sync.sh" ]; then bash "$ROOT/hooks/stop-sync.sh"; else echo '[k-orchestrator] Stop: batch 상태 및 EXECUTION_STATUS.md 업데이트가 완료되었는지 확인하세요.'; fi
